Description
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.player
Package relating to StarCosmetics Player API.

  • Uses of PlayerSetting in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.player

    Fields in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.player declared as PlayerSetting
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final PlayerSetting<Boolean>
    PlayerSetting.NOTIFICATIONS
    Whether the player should receive chat notifications.
    static final PlayerSetting<Boolean>
    PlayerSetting.SOUND_NOTIFICATIONS
    Whether the player should receive sound notifications.
    static final PlayerSetting<PlayerSetting.VelocityPower>
    PlayerSetting.STRUCTURE_VELOCITY
    How much the player should be launched when spawning a structure, to "avoid" suffocation.

    Description

    Method

    Fetches the setting value off of a Player.
